name: 11ai-antdesign-operations
description: Modular, version-aware skills for common Ant Design React operations.

interface.shortDescription: Build common Ant Design React interfaces.
interface.longDescription: A modular toolbox for setting up Ant Design, building layouts, forms, tables, navigation, overlays, and data displays, then theming, looking up, and troubleshooting the result.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use the 11ai-antdesign-operations skills for this Ant Design task.
